text.en: DCGAN supplied practical convolutional architecture rules for stable GAN image generation. It also showed that discriminator features learned without labels could transfer to recognition tasks.
text.zh: DCGAN 为稳定的 GAN 图像生成提供了实用的卷积架构规则。它还展示了无标签学习到的判别器特征可以迁移到识别任务。

text.en: Unsupervised representation learning with deep convolutional generative adversarial networks
text.zh: 使用深度卷积生成对抗网络进行无监督表示学习
